title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Jet Freight Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Jet Freight Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
